english: O Rama, noble son of Kaushalya, the eastern dawn is breaking
roman: Kaushalya supraja Rama purva sandhya pravartate

english: Arise O tiger among men — your divine daily duties await
roman: Uttishtha nara shardula kartavyam daivam ahnikam

english: Arise, arise O Govinda, arise O Garuda-bannered one
roman: Uttishtha uttishtha Govinda uttishtha Garuda dhvaja

english: Arise O beloved of Lakshmi, bestow auspiciousness on all three worlds
roman: Uttishtha kamala kanta trailokyam mangalam kuru

english: O Mother of all worlds, O enemy of Madhu and Kaitabha
roman: Matah samasta jagatam madhu Kaitabha are

english: You dwell on his chest worshipping the feet adored by gods
This supreme abode of Venkatanatha is declared
roman: Venkata nathasya paramam padam etad uktam

english: May this Venkatesha Suprabhatam be heard
Whoever reads the Venkatesha Suprabhatam with devotion
roman: Venkatesha suprabhatam yah pathed bhakti samyutah

english: Attains Tirupati and always receives the darshan of Venkatesha
roman: Tirupatim prapnuyat nityam Venkate shasya darshanam
